title: AWS placeholder
description: Mount the AWS secrets engine on a dev-mode Vault and pair it with MiniStack as a local AWS API. Walk through two of the three credential_type variants end to end: iam_user (Vault really creates and deletes IAM users) and assumed_role (Vault calls STS for short-lived sessions). Observe the equivalence between Vault lease lifecycle and the IAM User lifecycle, then tighten access by Role with Policy.

steps.title: 启动 MiniStack、enable AWS 引擎并指向本地端点
iam_user：每次取凭据 = AWS 上多一个真 IAM User
assumed_role：让 Vault 替你 AssumeRole 拿 STS 三件套
Policy 路径踩坑：creds/ vs sts/ vs config/
